name: SUI Group Holdings Ltd.
summary: SUI Group Holdings Ltd. (SUIG) is a company that has undergone rebranding and operates a digital asset treasury strategy, holding SUI tokens and other cryptocurrency assets. The company also makes portfolio investments and operates across industries impacted by digital assets and cryptocurrencies. Specific products or services beyond digital asset holdings and investments are not detailed in this section of the filing.

products.name: Digital Asset Treasury
products.description: Strategy focused on holding SUI tokens and other digital asset cryptocurrencies as treasury assets.
